title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Equitas Small Finance Bank

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Equitas Small Finance Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Equitas Small Finance Bank! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Bhubaneswar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Equitas Small Finance Bank:
Equitas Small Finance Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Equitas Small Finance Bank!
